Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have been given a Long Process Description that describes an involved process for onboarding a new rental property into portfolio by a large scale property management company

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt instructs You have just heard the long detailed explanation above from an interviewee describing their property onboarding process Your goal is to ask the interviewee a series of questions to clarify and improve your understanding of their process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce a list of targeted open ended questions that we would ask the interviewee

Name: Validation - IND
Text: I must not produce any disclaimers because the instructions specify You have just heard the long detailed explanation and Your goal is to ask a series of questions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to produce a list with bullet points or numbered items each containing an open ended question

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me check that Ive covered uncover missing details understand decision criteria clarify roles and responsibilities verify timing and sequencing learn about exceptions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We have uncovered missing details for example how is property coordinator assigned how do you verify documents authenticity understand decision criteria what are the factors that lead to assigning property manager clarify roles who exactly does each step verify timing and sequencing how soon after documentation verification is property activated and how exceptions are handled

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will produce around 12 or so questions ensuring they are targeted and open ended

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The instructions said apply markdown formatting where appropriate to enhance readability so I can use bullet lists
